footer.description: The leading online platform for creating CVs and Cover Letters in Vietnam. ATS-optimized to help you easily conquer the most demanding employers.

hero.title: Create ATS-Friendly CVs & Professional Cover Letters with AI
hero.subtitle: With just a few simple steps, JobReady helps you own a perfect job application, matching 100% with the employer's requirements. Increase your hiring chances by 80% today.

mockCv.job1Desc1: Led a team of 5 developers to re-architect the core payment gateway.
mockCv.job1Desc3: Implemented CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions and Docker.
mockCv.job2Desc1: Developed responsive web applications using React and Next.js.
mockCv.job2Desc2: Collaborated closely with UX/UI designers to ensure pixel-perfect implementation.
mockCv.name: Nguyen Van A
mockCv.jdDesc: TechCorp is looking for an experienced Software Engineer to join our core product team. You will be responsible for designing and scaling large-scale backend systems.
mockCv.clP1: I am writing to express my interest in the Software Engineer position at TechCorp. With over 5 years of full-stack development experience, specifically in database optimization and AWS, I am confident in my ability to make a positive impact on your team.

features.title: Comprehensive Solutions for Your Job Application
features.subtitle: We provide smart tools to help you confidently pass even the most rigorous resume screening rounds.
features.f1Desc: AI automatically understands the Job Description (JD), extracts important keywords, and fine-tunes your profile to perfectly match the requirements.
features.f2Desc: The system simulates how ATS filters work to score your CV, pointing out formatting issues and missing keywords that need immediate fixing.
features.f3Desc: JobReady automatically generates highly personalized cover letters for each company, clearly highlighting your strengths.
features.f4Desc: Easily translate your entire CV content to English, Vietnamese, or other languages with just a single click.

howItWorks.title: How to Create a Professional CV in 3 Steps
howItWorks.subtitle: The CV design process has never been simpler and faster.
howItWorks.s1Desc: Fill in your education, work experience, and skills just once to create a Master Profile.
howItWorks.s2Desc: Paste the job posting of the company you want to apply to into the system. The AI will immediately compare and suggest appropriate adjustments.
howItWorks.s3Desc: Receive your fully optimized CV and Cover Letter. Download the PDF format and you're ready to send it to employers.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)
faq.subtitle: CANDIDATE SUPPORT
faq.q1: Is creating a CV on JobReady completely free?
faq.a1: Yes. We offer a free plan that allows candidates to create and download standard CVs unlimited times. If you want to use advanced AI features (like automatic cover letter generation), you can upgrade to the Pro plan.
faq.q2: What is an ATS-friendly CV and why is it important?
faq.a2: ATS (Applicant Tracking System) is automated screening software used by 90% of large companies. If your CV has complex formatting (contains many images, complex dual columns), the ATS cannot read the text and automatically rejects your profile. CVs at JobReady are specifically designed to pass this test.
faq.a3: Absolutely safe. All your personal data, contact information, and work history are encrypted on international standard cloud servers. We promise never to sell data to any third party.

cta.title: Start your journey to conquering your dream job
cta.subtitle: Thousands of candidates have found their ideal jobs thanks to having a professional CV. Don't let your opportunity slip away.
